zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Tibetot於1228年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆時，他的父親Henry de Tibetot29歲，母親Alda de Nettlestead19歲。他於1269年10月18日之前與Eva de Chaworth結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆被列為keeper of the town of nottingham。他去世於1298年5月22日在英國肯特內特萊斯亞德享年70歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Tibetot于1228年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆时，他的父亲Henry de Tibetot29岁，母亲Alda de Nettlestead19岁。他于1269年10月18日之前与Eva de Chaworth结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆被列为keeper of the town of nottingham。他去世于1298年5月22日在英国肯特內特萊斯亞德享年70岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Tibetot was born in 1228, in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, his father, Henry de Tibetot, was 29 and his mother, Alda de Nettlestead, was 19. He married Eva de Chaworth before 18 October 1269. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as keeper of the town of nottingham in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England. He died on 22 May 1298, in Nettlestead, Kent, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Tibetot est né en 1228, à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Tibetot, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alda de Nettlestead, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Eva de Chaworth avant 18 octobre 1269. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est keeper of the town of nottingham à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1298, à Nettlestead, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Oktober 1269 Eva de Chaworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als keeper of the town of nottingham in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Mai 1298 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Nettlestead, Kent, England und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lui sposato Eva de Chaworth prima del 18 ottobre 1269. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come keeper of the town of nottingham nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England. Morì il 22 maggio 1298, nel Nettlestead, Kent, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Tibetotが1228年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムで生まれた時，父Henry de Tibetotは29歳，母Alda de Nettlesteadは19歳であった。1269年10月18日以前にEva de Chaworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムでの職業はkeeper of the town of nottinghamと記録されている。彼は1298年5月22日にイギリスケントネットレステアドで70歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.Gascoigne, France: 캐나다 서스캐처원 디어 포크스 노. 2 가스코익니
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Tibetot(이)가 1228년 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Tibetot(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alda de Nettlestead(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1269년 10월 18일 이전 Eva de Chaworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 keeper of the town of nottingham이었다. 그는 1298년 5월 22일 영국 켄트 네틀레스테아드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Tibetot nasceu em 1228, em Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Tibetot, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alda de Nettlestead, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva de Chaworth antes 18 de outubro de 1269. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como keeper of the town of nottingham em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1298, em Nettlestead, Kent, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Gascoigne, France: гаскоигн, дир форкс но. 2, Саскачеван, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Tibetot родился в 1228 г. в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Tibetot было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alda de Nettlestead, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva de Chaworth перед 18 октябрь 1269 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии keeper of the town of nottingham в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Он умер 22 мая 1298 г. в местности неттлестид, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con Eva de Chaworth antes de 18 de octubre de 1269. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era keeper of the town of nottingham en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1298, en Nettlestead, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
